---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement, new agent, or design change
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What's the underlying need? What's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed approach

Sketch the solution. If it touches the agent topology, the persistence schema, or the OpenClaw surface, call that out.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this. Why is the proposed approach better?

## Architectural impact

- [ ] Affects the persistence schema (`Events` / `Submissions` / `Talks`)
- [ ] Adds or changes an MAF agent
- [ ] Affects OpenClaw or the approval gate
- [ ] Needs an ADR

If any box is checked, an ADR in [`docs/adr/`](../../docs/adr/) is probably required before code lands.

## Additional context

Links, references, related issues.
